'''''Uhuru''''' was an [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] [[BFF-1 bulk freighter/Legends|BFF-1 bulk freighter]] bearing supplies as part of a larger convoy that gathered near [[Orron III]] en route to the soon-to-be-finished [[DS-1 Orbital Battle Station/Legends|Death Star I]]. The convoy was due to rendezvous with the freighter [[Toral (BFF-1 bulk freighter)|''Toral'']], which was [[Rescue of enslaved Wookiees|attacked]] on the way by [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel]] forces. Learning of the rendezvous location from the ''Toral'', the Rebels dispatched [[BTL Y-wing starfighter/Legends|Y-wings]] from [[Red Squadron (Rebel Alliance)/Legends|Red]] and [[Gold Squadron (Rebel Alliance)/Legends|Gold]] squadrons, along with a [[T-65 X-wing starfighter/Legends|X-wing]] from [[Blue Squadron (Rebel Alliance)/Legends|Blue Squadron]] to [[Battle of Orron III|destroy]] the convoy.

Despite heavy resistance from the escorting [[Alpha-class Xg-1 Star Wing/Legends|Assault Gunboats]], the ''Uhuru'', along with the rest of the convoy, was destroyed by [[Pilot/Legends|pilot]] [[Keyan Farlander/Legends|Keyan Farlander]]<ref name="CSWE" /> and the Rebel ships.

==Behind the scenes==
Uhuru is a Swahili word meaning "freedom." The name could be a pun on [[MemoryAlpha:Uhura|Uhura]], a character from [[Memoryalpha:Star Trek|Star Trek]]. Uhuru was also a satellite of the early 1970s.

==Appearances==
*[[Star Wars: X-Wing (video game)|''Star Wars: X-Wing'']] {{1st}}
